rawProposal:
- Lock every prompt to photoreal live-action period look and ban illustrated, anime, cartoon, painted, or smooth CGI rendering.
- State exact CAST COUNT and named identities, and forbid any extras, background crowd, or unlisted people on screen.
- Lock each character’s face, wardrobe, and grooming for the full clip and forbid mid-clip identity or costume drift.
- For silent or no-dialogue clips, require closed mouth, calm face, and no speaking, shouting, or agitation gestures.
- Keep prompts complete and ungarbled, with clear who acts or speaks so the wrong character never performs the beat.
- Specify naturalistic skin, open eye-line, and intended expression so faces do not read shut, downcast, vampiric, or non-human.
- Auto-review must fail any clip that breaks style lock, cast count, identity continuity, or silent-mouth rules.

items.text: Lock every prompt to photoreal live-action period look and ban illustrated, anime, cartoon, painted, or smooth CGI rendering.
State exact CAST COUNT and named identities, and forbid any extras, background crowd, or unlisted people on screen.
Lock each character’s face, wardrobe, and grooming for the full clip and forbid mid-clip identity or costume drift.
For silent or no-dialogue clips, require closed mouth, calm face, and no speaking, shouting, or agitation gestures.
Keep prompts complete and ungarbled, with clear who acts or speaks so the wrong character never performs the beat.
Specify naturalistic skin, open eye-line, and intended expression so faces do not read shut, downcast, vampiric, or non-human.
Auto-review must fail any clip that breaks style lock, cast count, identity continuity, or silent-mouth rules.
